name: proposal
description: Turn late-stage opportunities into proposals that are easier to approve. Reduce friction, answer likely buyer questions in advance, and clarify the yes-path.
author: dpetcr

capabilities.friction_reduction: Identify and reduce approval friction before buyer review
capabilities.proposal_review: Audit proposals for scope, pricing, clarity, and approval readiness
capabilities.approval_path_design: Clarify next steps, stakeholders, and decision path

audience: Consultants and agencies writing client proposals
